name: Summer Beach Day
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a cheerful sandy beach scene with gentle ocean waves rolling in, a big bright sun with rays in the sky, a striped beach umbrella stuck in the sand, a beach ball, and a bucket and spade resting nearby

name: Summer Ice Cream Cone
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a tall ice cream cone with three rounded scoops stacked on top of a waffle cone, a cherry on top, a few sprinkles and a little drip down the side, with a happy smiling face on the front scoop

name: Summer Swimming Pool
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a fun backyard swimming pool with rippling water, an inflatable ring float and a beach ball bobbing on the surface, a diving board on one side, a sun lounger and a small palm in pot beside the pool

name: Summer Sandcastle
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a detailed sandcastle on the beach with several towers topped by little triangle flags, an arched doorway and a moat, a bucket and spade leaning against it, a couple of seashells and a starfish in the sand

name: Summer Watermelon Slice
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a big juicy triangular watermelon slice with a thick rind, neat rows of seeds, and a cute smiling face, with a couple of drips and a small leaf at the corner

name: Summer Sun Close-Up
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a large round smiling sun filling the page, long pointed and wavy rays radiating outward, a happy cheerful face with rosy cheeks, a couple of tiny puffy clouds peeking at the edges

name: Summer Flip-Flops
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a pair of beach flip-flops resting side by side in the sand, decorated with simple flower patterns on the straps, a few seashells and a small starfish scattered around them

name: Summer Lemonade Stand
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a cute wooden lemonade stand with a banner sign reading lemonade, a big pitcher of lemonade and two filled cups on the counter, a bowl of cut lemons and a little price card, a sun in the corner

name: Summer Beach Ball
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a single large round beach ball with wide curved stripe panels, sitting on the sand near the edge of the water, simple bold shapes that are easy to color

name: Summer Picnic Scene
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a checkered picnic blanket spread on the grass under a leafy tree, an open picnic basket, sandwiches and fruit on plates, a pitcher of juice, a few flowers and a butterfly fluttering above

name: Summer Popsicle Trio
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: three different ice popsicles on sticks standing in a row, one with a twisty swirl, one with a bite taken out and a drip, and one shaped like a rocket, each with a small cute smiling face

name: Summer Surfer Kid
subject: holidays/summer
prompt: a happy cartoon kid in swim shorts riding a surfboard on a curling ocean wave, arms out for balance, a big smile, the sun and a seagull in the sky and splashy water around the board
